findings.title: GitHub OAuth Token in Plaintext .env
findings.notes: Token must be revoked by user at github.com/settings/tokens. .env patterns added to .gitignore. File is gitignored but still on disk.

findings.title: CDN Dependency Without SRI
findings.notes: Post-load shape validation via _validateFuseShape() in both Utils.js and IndexWorker.js. Validates constructor, .search() method, and array return. TODO removed.

findings.title: Inline Event Handlers (CSP Bypass)
findings.notes: Replaced with addEventListener delegation using capture:true for load/error events.

findings.title: .env Files Not Excluded in .gitignore
findings.notes: Added .env, .env.*, *.env patterns.

findings.title: No URL Validation on TVA Cache Fetch
findings.notes: Added origin validation and credentials:'omit'.

findings.title: Worker Message Handler Without Input Validation
findings.notes: Switch/default with validation and console.warn for unknown commands.

findings.title: Error Stack Traces Exposed
findings.notes: Worker postMessage uses error.message only.

findings.title: tinymce XSS (transitive dev dep)
findings.notes: Dev dependency only, not shipped. No production impact.

findings.title: No Protocol Validation on Image Paths
findings.notes: Added javascript:/data:/vbscript: protocol rejection in sanitizePath().

findings.title: Prototype Key Traversal in extractPathFromObject
findings.notes: Added __proto__, constructor, prototype key filtering.

findings.title: IndexedDB/localStorage Data Without Schema Validation
findings.notes: Added _sanitizeData() recursive stripping of __proto__/constructor/prototype keys, plus _jsonReviver for JSON.parse. Both IndexedDB and localStorage paths sanitize. TODO removed.

findings.title: Build Script Variable Injection Risk
findings.notes: Strict regex validation for VERSION and MODULE_ID.

findings.title: Silent Error Handling Patterns
findings.notes: All empty catch blocks now have console.warn or console.error.

findings.title: Hardcoded Fallback Image Path
findings.notes: Extracted to FALLBACK_IMAGE constant.

findings.title: Console Logging Sensitive Paths
findings.notes: Intentional for security debugging. Paths only logged on validation failure.

findings.title: Window Global Exposure
findings.notes: Standard Foundry VTT practice. Object.freeze would break mutable singleton.

findings.title: package.json Version Mismatch
findings.notes: Both module.json and package.json synced.

findings.title: Filter Term localStorage Without Length Limit
findings.notes: 200-char max length check.

findings.title: Worker postMessage Without Origin Comment
findings.notes: Dedicated Workers are same-origin by browser design. No cross-origin postMessage possible. Not a real vulnerability.

findings.title: innerHTML with Hardcoded HTML String
findings.notes: String is fully hardcoded with no user data. Safe, but inconsistent with codebase escapeHtml() pattern.
